citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
During the review of the semi-annual reports submitted to the Institutional Official (IO), it was noted that the report dated
10/3/25 was not signed by a majority of the IACUC members. Only three of the six IACUC members signed the report.
Per this Section, one of the functions of the IACUC is to prepare reports of the Committee’s semi-annual evaluations of
the program for animal use and its inspection of the facilities. The reports shall be reviewed and signed by a majority of
the IACUC members prior to being submitted to the IO. This process ensures that all members of the IACUC Committee
have an opportunity to review the report/include any minority views and ensure that the IO is kept informed and provided
with accurate information on the status of both the animal use program and the research facilities.
Correct from this date 2/3/26 forward for all future semi-annual reports from the IACUC to the Institutional Official. In
addition, the 10/3/25 semi-annual report should be reviewed/signed by at least one additional IACUC member at the next
IACUC meeting to be held in March 2026.

The Continency Plan has not been reviewed by the research facility on at least an annual basis. The last review of the
Contingency Plan was completed in 2024; the Plan was not reviewed in 2025.
Per this Section, a research facility must review their Continency Plan on at least an annual basis to ensure that it
adequately addresses potential emergency situations that could be detrimental to the health and well-being of the animals
and they must maintain documentation of their annual reviews. The research facility needs to review the Contingency
Plan and document the review. Correct by 4/1/26.
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representative.
*END OF REPORT*
n

narrative:
2.31(c)(3) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
During the review of the semi-annual reports submitted to the Institutional Official (IO), it was noted that the report dated 
10/3/25 was not signed by a majority of the IACUC members. Only three of the six IACUC members signed the report.  
 
Per this Section, one of the functions of the IACUC is to prepare reports of the Committee’s semi-annual evaluations of 
the program for animal use and its inspection of the facilities. The reports shall be reviewed and signed by a majority of 
the IACUC members prior to being submitted to the IO. This process ensures that all members of the IACUC Committee 
have an opportunity to review the report/include any minority views and ensure that the IO is kept informed and provided 
with accurate information on the status of both the animal use program and the research facilities. 
 
Correct from this date 2/3/26 forward for all future semi-annual reports from the IACUC to the Institutional Official. In 
addition, the 10/3/25 semi-annual report should be reviewed/signed by at least one additional IACUC member at the next 
IACUC meeting to be held in March 2026. 
2.38(l)(2) 
   
Miscellaneous. 
The Continency Plan has not been reviewed by the research facility on at least an annual basis. The last review of the 
Contingency Plan was completed in 2024; the Plan was not reviewed in 2025.  
 
Per this Section, a research facility must review their Continency Plan on at least an annual basis to ensure that it 
adequately addresses potential emergency situations that could be detrimental to the health and well-being of the animals 
and they must maintain documentation of their annual reviews. The research facility needs to review the Contingency 
Plan and document the review. Correct by 4/1/26. 
 
This inspection and exit briefing were conducted with facility representative.  
 
*END OF REPORT*

n
